name: STACCA: Transformer-Based Multi-Agent RL for Networked Systems with Long-Range Interactions
content: Multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) has shown promise for large-scale network control, yet existing methods face two major limitations. First, they typically rely on an exponential decay property of agent interactions on far-away nodes, which can be exploited to develop more efficient and tractable MARL algorithms. When this exponential decay property does not hold, these algorithms do not account for long-range interactions such as epidemic outbreaks or cascading power failures. Second, e
summary: STACCA 提出了一个基于变压器的多智能体强化学习框架，旨在解决现有方法在处理远距离交互和网络泛化方面存在的问题。
key_insights: STACCA 解决了现有MARL算法对远距离交互（如流行病传播、连锁电力故障）缺乏考虑的问题。
STACCA 引入了一个中央的图变换批评者来建模远距离依赖，并提供系统级反馈，同时其共享的图变换行动者学习适应不同网络拓扑的一般化策略。
STACCA 集成了一种新的反事实优势估计算法，该算法与状态价值批评估计兼容，以改善训练期间的信用分配。
xihe_relevance: STACCA 的架构可能对曦和在大规模网络控制系统中的应用具有潜在价值。
